feedback.placeholder:
Enter your feedback here...
Ctrl+Enter to submit, Ctrl+V to paste images
feedback.placeholderWithAlias:
Send feedback to {{alias}}...
Ctrl+Enter to submit, Ctrl+V to paste images

testLog.placeholder: Enter test logs here, will be appended to feedback

images.limitCount: You can attach up to {{max}} images.
images.limitSize: Each image must be under {{max}}MB. Current: {{size}}MB
images.dropHint: Drag & drop or paste images here (max {{max}})
images.errorInvalidType: "{{name}}" is not a supported image format

sidebar.confirmDelete: This session is still pending. Delete and send empty feedback?

settings.title: Settings
settings.autostartDesc: Automatically start My Last Feedback when the system boots
settings.clearHistoryDesc: Remove all callers, sessions, and attached images
settings.aboutDesc: A desktop app for MCP interactive feedback
settings.promptsEmpty:
No prompt files found
Place .prompt.md files in mcp_prompts/ next to the exe
settings.taskbarFlashDesc: Flash the taskbar icon when a new request arrives while the window is not focused
settings.systemNotificationDesc: Show a system notification when a new request arrives while the window is not focused
settings.persistentUnreadDesc: Keep the unread badge blinking until you view the caller

callerManager.empty: No callers yet. Callers appear when AI agents connect.
callerManager.removeConfirmText: Remove "{{name}}"? All {{count}} session(s) will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
callerManager.mergeSelectTarget: Click a target caller to merge into
callerManager.mergeConfirmText: Merge "{{source}}" into "{{target}}"? All sessions will be moved. This cannot be undone.
callerManager.maxSessionsHint: 0 = unlimited. Oldest completed sessions are removed first when exceeded.
callerManager.autoRemoveEmptyHint: Automatically remove callers with zero sessions when a new session arrives
callerManager.autoHideInactiveHint: Hide callers with no new sessions for the specified hours. 0 = disabled.
